ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the case was last updated */,
  "date_day" TEXT /* Date of the case */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Elapsed time since the first case was reported */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicators */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Data validation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages (e.g., 0-19, 20-39) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_group_population" INTEGER /* Population of the age group */,
  "age_group_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the age group in the total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "case_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case demographic */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the region and age group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the cases */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "login_history" TEXT /* Login history of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the case was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the case was accessed */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government report, hospital records, laboratory test results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the case (e.g., validated, pending, invalid) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality of the case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being predicted */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "predicted_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Predicted number of hospitalizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "agency1" TEXT /* Name of the first agency */,
  "agency2" TEXT /* Name of the second agency */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., data sharing, joint research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
